# Validation Checklist

## Pre-Conversion Validation
- [ ] Source file exists and is accessible
- [ ] Target format is supported
- [ ] Required dependencies are installed
- [ ] Input format matches specified type
- [ ] Output destination is writable

## Conversion Validation
- [ ] Conversion process completes without errors
- [ ] Output file is created successfully
- [ ] File size is reasonable (not corrupted)
- [ ] Basic format validation passes

## Content Validation
- [ ] Output opens in target application
- [ ] Key content is preserved (text, structure)
- [ ] Images render correctly
- [ ] Audio/video plays without issues
- [ ] Timing and synchronization maintained

## Quality Validation
- [ ] Visual quality meets requirements
- [ ] Audio quality is acceptable
- [ ] Text accuracy (for OCR)
- [ ] Geometry preservation (for CAD)
- [ ] Animation functionality (for GIF)

## Post-Conversion Checks
- [ ] File integrity verification
- [ ] Metadata preservation
- [ ] Cross-platform compatibility
- [ ] Performance requirements met
